code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(l)
  l
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
let n = tokens.len()

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let token = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  let num = match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  nums = list.push(nums, num)
  i = i + 1
end

mut result: List<Int> = []
mut running_sum = 0
mut j = 0
while j < nums.len()
  let val = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  running_sum = running_sum + val
  result = list.push(result, running_sum)
  j = j + 1
end

mut output = ""
mut k = 0
let m = result.len()
while k < m
  let v = match result.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    output = "#{v}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(output)
